title: 12pcs Artificial Calla Lily Flowers,13" Single Heads PU Flower Small Flower Bouquet Accessorie,Calla Lily Bridal Wedding Bouquet for Greenery Plants Indoor Outside Garland Home Office Decor (Purple)
features: Artificial calla lily flowers: height about 33cm, flower: about 6.5 x 9 cm, you will receive 12 pieces per pack. No fading, the flower part is made of soft rubber, the stem is made of plastic, artificial plants for home and office, flower stem 0.5cm.

Nothing looks more natural and brings your indoor environment to life like ornamental plants, yellow center, calla lily looks more like a real flower, can be used in home, hotels, office, cafe, wedding, baby bath. Home decoration for spring flowers, kitchen, wedding decorations and centerpieces.

No maintenance or watering required. Suitable for indoor or outdoor use. Perfect for any room or office decoration. Very suitable for killing flowers, do not care, but also to the room to add green breath. Tip: The flower pots and decorations are for reference only.

33cm Artificial Calla Lily, Beautiful Colours and Design Whether for separate work or placing them in a tropical palm leaf arrangement, it is a good choice. Tip: When the product is out of the box, it will inevitably be crushed. You can use a hair dryer to blow hot air against the heart of the flower in the most natural state.

Includes 12 calla lilies per pack, calla lilies are a must-have choice for a wedding party. Use them as a bridal bouquet or put them as centerpieces on the table or create your own brooch, vase not included.
description: Tips: Because of the box packaging, they can be bendable and adjustable to return to their original. If you find some petals become wrinkled during the long time shipping, the product needs to be shaped with a hair dryer. Create many lovely bouquets for DIY floral decor that fits perfectly into your personal decor. Perfect for your home, wedding, office, party, garden, coffee shop and other place decoration.
